headline: Does Dow (DOW) Leadership Shift Reinforce or Rethink Its Cost-Cut and Asset-Optimization Playbook?
summary: Dow Inc. recently announced that Chair and CEO Jim Fitterling will move to Executive Chair and current COO Karen S. Carter will become CEO and join the Board on July 1, 2026, while Richard Davis remains Independent Lead Director. Carter’s promotion from COO reflects the Board’s preference for continuity, drawing on her extensive operational background and broad experience across Dow’s largest businesses and corporate functions. We’ll now examine how Karen Carter’s elevation to CEO could...

headline: Assessing Dow (DOW) Valuation After A Sharp Share Price Rebound
summary: Event context and recent share performance Dow (DOW) has been drawing attention after a period of mixed short term trading and stronger recent momentum, with the stock showing a 6.9% return over the past month and 38.6% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Dow. At a share price of US$39.16, Dow’s recent 61.35% year to date share price return contrasts with a weaker 3 year total shareholder return of 17.60% decline. This suggests that positive momentum is a relatively recent...
